verdict: A mechanical hair removal device with no skincare ingredients—effectiveness depends on device precision and technique rather than formulation. Best for facial peach fuzz, though results vary significantly by hair type.

_research.name: Manual Facial Hair Removal Epilator
pros: Reusable alternative to razors and wax
_research.con: Not ideal for coarse or dark hair; can cause temporary redness and doesn't address ingrown hair prevention.
